name: Beef En Brochette
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds beef sirloin tip or top round, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and reserve half a cup of liquid. Cover and refrigerate the pineapple chunks.
2. Combine the reserved pineapple liquid with 57 sauce and the remaining ingredients (white wine, salad oil, salt, and pepper). Pour over the meat.
3. Marinate for 2 to 3 hours in the refrigerator, turning occasionally.
4. Thread alternating pieces of meat and pineapple onto six skewers (12 inch long).
5. Allow for approximately 4-5 pieces of meat and 5-6 pieces of pineapple per skewer.
6. Brush each skewer with marinade and season lightly with salt and pepper.
7. Grill or broil at a distance of 3 inches from the heat source for 5 minutes on each side to achieve medium-rare doneness.
8. Makes 6 servings.
